creator: lev@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks like, it is upstream problem. I was told by upstream maintainers, that they are overhauling header system right now.

BTW, what do you link with this library? As far as I understand, upstream authors are in doubt, should they allow such usage of library or not, so any example of 3rd party software which want to use stlink as library and not as command will be useful.

Thank you.
